input.title: HR Management System
input.description: HR Management System is a web-based enterprise platform that centralizes operational workflows, data visibility, and cross-functional reporting.

user_classes.Admin: Configures the system, manages users, and oversees permissions and settings.
user_classes.Manager: Oversees departmental workflows, approvals, KPIs, and operational reporting.
user_classes.Employee: Performs day-to-day operational tasks within assigned modules and permissions.
user_classes.User: Generic authenticated platform user with access limited by role and department.

definitions.Admin: System user with full administrative privileges.
definitions.Manager: Operational owner of a department, module, or workflow.
definitions.Employee: End user performing role-specific business operations.

constraints: Initial release will focus on the web platform only
Role-based access control is mandatory across all modules
Operational data must be auditable and retained according to policy

operating_environment.frontend: Web-based interface built with React and accessible through modern browsers.
operating_environment.backend: Service layer implemented with Java Spring Boot, PostgreSQL for business operations.
operating_environment.deployment: Cloud-hosted environment with centralized monitoring, backups, and automated deployments.

NFR-01.title: Security and Access Control
requirements: All sensitive data must be encrypted in transit and at rest
Role-based authorization must restrict access by module and action
All authentication events and privileged actions must be logged

NFR-02.title: Performance and Scalability
requirements: Core pages and dashboards should load within acceptable enterprise SLAs
The platform must support concurrent usage across multiple departments
Background jobs and reporting workloads should not block transactional workflows

NFR-03.title: Reliability and Recoverability
requirements: Automated backups must run on a defined schedule
Critical workflows should support retry-safe processing and audit logging
Operational alerts should be generated for failures and degraded services

system_attributes.reliability: Platform should provide resilient transactional processing with backup and recovery capabilities.
system_attributes.scalability: Architecture should support horizontal scaling for APIs, background workers, and reporting services.
system_attributes.security: Authentication, authorization, encryption, and auditability must be built into every module.
system_attributes.maintainability: Codebase should remain modular, observable, and safe to extend through clear service boundaries.

out_of_scope: Native mobile applications in the first release
Large third-party marketplace or legacy ERP migrations unless explicitly scoped
Non-core experimental modules outside the platform's operational workflows

FR-01.title: Employee Onboarding
requirements: Online onboarding form with personal and employment details
Document upload for ID, tax forms, and contracts
Welcome kit and IT setup requests

FR-03.title: Attendance and Time Tracking
requirements: Clock in/out via web or mobile

FR-04.title: Leave Management
requirements: Apply for leave with type and dates

FR-05.title: Payroll Processing
requirements: Calculate salary with deductions and allowances
Direct deposit to employee bank account

FR-07.title: Recruitment and Job Postings
requirements: Post job openings internally and externally

FR-08.title: Training and Development
requirements: Assign training to employees or departments

FR-09.title: Organization Chart
requirements: Visual org chart with reporting structure

FR-16.title: Employee Directory
requirements: Filter by department, location, and role

FR-23.title: Asset Management
requirements: Track company assets assigned to employees

FR-26.title: Mobile App Access
requirements: Mobile app for attendance and leave

FR-29.title: Probation Management
requirements: Track probation periods with end dates

FR-30.title: Letter Generation
requirements: Offer letters, experience letters, salary certificates

FR-01.title: Design Employee Onboarding UI
FR-01.description: Design the user interface for employee onboarding. Create the screens, forms, dashboards, or status views needed by the SRS and make the workflow clear, responsive, and accessible for the target users.
acceptance_criteria: UI design for employee onboarding is complete and reviewable.
The employee onboarding design is responsive and accessible.
The design for employee onboarding aligns with the documented user flow and validation states.

FR-01.title: Frontend Implementation of Employee Onboarding
FR-01.description: Implement the frontend behavior for employee onboarding. Build the required user interactions, validation states, loading states, and error handling so the interface supports these behaviors: Online onboarding form with personal and employment details; Document upload for ID, tax forms, and contracts; Onboarding checklist with task assignments.
acceptance_criteria: Frontend implements the required employee onboarding user interactions.
Validation, loading, and error states for employee onboarding are handled in the UI.
Frontend behavior for employee onboarding is integrated correctly with backend APIs.

FR-01.title: Backend Implementation of Employee Onboarding
FR-01.description: Implement the backend logic for employee onboarding. Build the required APIs, business rules, validation, permissions, persistence, and processing needed to support these behaviors: Online onboarding form with personal and employment details; Document upload for ID, tax forms, and contracts; Onboarding checklist with task assignments.
acceptance_criteria: Backend logic for employee onboarding is implemented and testable.
APIs and business rules for employee onboarding enforce validation and security requirements.
Data handling for employee onboarding is reliable and supports the required workflow.

FR-01.title: Database Design for Employee Onboarding
FR-01.description: Design the data model and persistence strategy for employee onboarding. Define entities, relationships, indexes, retention rules, and migration changes needed to store and query the workflow reliably.
acceptance_criteria: The data model for employee onboarding supports the required workflow.
Relationships, constraints, and indexes for employee onboarding are defined correctly.
Schema changes for employee onboarding can be applied safely in target environments.

FR-01.title: Testing Employee Onboarding Functionality
FR-01.description: Create and execute tests for employee onboarding. Cover the main success flows, failure scenarios, permission checks, validation rules, integrations, and operational edge cases described in the SRS so the implementation is safe to release.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover the main success and failure scenarios for employee onboarding.
Security, validation, and permission checks for employee onboarding are verified.
Regression coverage exists for the most important employee onboarding behaviors.
